content.p: There are authorized to be appropriated such funds as may be necessary to carry out this subchapter and the amendments made by this subchapter.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: This subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning Pub. L. 101–612, Nov. 16, 1990, 104 Stat. 3209, which is classified principally to this subchapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under section 460bbb of this title and Tables.
